title: pteracanthus calycinus
intro: Pteracanthus calycinus, also known as the butterfly flower or butterfly bush, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pteracanthus calycinus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and support respiratory health, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Pteracanthus calycinus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
